# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a security group for EC2 instances. Allow SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) access from anywhere. Our development team works remotely and needs flexible access.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud network security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_network_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: 'Secure EC2 Security Group with restricted access'

Parameters:
  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
    Description: VPC ID where the security group will be created
  
  AllowedSSHCIDR:
    Type: String
    Description: CIDR block allowed for SSH access (use your organization's IP range)
    AllowedPattern: '^(([0-9]|[1-9][0-9]|1[0-9]{2}|2[0-4][0-9]|25[0-5])\.){3}([0-9]|[1-9][0-9]|1[0-9]{2}|2[0-4][0-9]|25[0-5])(\/([0-9]|[1-2][0-9]|3[0-2]))$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid CIDR block
  
  AllowedHTTPCIDR:
    Type: String
    Description: CIDR block allowed for HTTP access
    Default: '0.0.0.0/0'
    AllowedPattern: '^(([0-9]|[1-9][0-9]|1[0-9]{2}|2[0-4][0-9]|25[0-5])\.){3}([0-9]|[1-9][0-9]|1[0-9]{2}|2[0-4][0-9]|25[0-5])(\/([0-9]|[1-2][0-9]|3[0-2]))$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid CIDR block
  
  AllowedHTTPSCIDR:
    Type: String
    Description: CIDR block allowed for HTTPS access
    Default: '0.0.0.0/0'
    AllowedPattern: '^(([0-9]|[1-9][0-9]|1[0-9]{2}|2[0-4][0-9]|25[0-5])\.){3}([0-9]|[1-9][0-9]|1[0-9]{2}|2[0-4][0-9]|25[0-5])(\/([0-9]|[1-2][0-9]|3[0-2]))$'
    ConstraintDescription: Must be a valid CIDR block

Resources:
  EC2SecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupName: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2-sg'
      GroupDescription: Security group for EC2 instances with controlled access
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref AllowedSSHCIDR
          Description: SSH access from authorized CIDR only
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: !Ref AllowedHTTPCIDR
          Description: HTTP access
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: !Ref AllowedHTTPSCIDR
          Description: HTTPS access
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 443
          ToPort: 443
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: HTTPS outbound for updates and package downloads
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 80
          ToPort: 80
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
          Description: HTTP outbound for updates and package downloads
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-ec2-security-group'
        - Key: Environment
          Value: Production
        - Key: ManagedBy
          Value: CloudFormation

  SecurityGroupLogGroup:
    Type: AWS::Logs::LogGroup
    Properties:
      LogGroupName: !Sub '/aws/securitygroup/${AWS::StackName}'
      RetentionInDays: 90

Outputs:
  SecurityGroupId:
    Description: Security Group ID
    Value: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
    Export:
      Name: !Sub '${AWS::StackName}-SecurityGroupId'
  
  SecurityGroupName:
    Description: Security Group Name
    Value: !Ref EC2SecurityGroup
